title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their organizations have adopted AI coding tools at scale. The panel covers workflow changes, productivity measurement, and strategic advice for leaders making this transition.
